verse.text:
And the five thousand, that are left in the breadth over against the five and twenty thousand, shall be a profane
place for the city, for dwelling, and for suburbs: and the city shall be in the midst thereof.

commentary: A powerful reminder of faith and encouragement for our daily journey.
history: This scripture has encouraged readers for generations.
takeaways: Focus on the Lord Jesus Christ and His grace.
Explore the scriptures with a prayerful heart.
Apply these eternal truths to your walk today.

wordStudy.definition: Sacrificial, unconditional love; the love of God for man, which serves as the ultimate model for Christian fellowship.

theme.name: Royal Purity
